ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the building (e.g., New York, NY) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., Office, Warehouse, Data Center) */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the building */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the building is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the building is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the building */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the building */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the meter is installed */,
  "meter_name" TEXT /* Name of the meter */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of meter (e.g., Power, Light, HVAC) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the meter was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the meter was last calibrated */,
  "location_within_building" TEXT /* Location of the meter within the building (e.g., Floor 1, Room 101) */,
  "meter_model" TEXT /* Model number of the meter */,
  "meter_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the meter */,
  "meter_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meters_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meter_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kW, Lumens) */,
  "reading_type" TEXT /* Type of reading (e.g., Actual, Predicted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_readings_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend log */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trend log interval */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trend log interval */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Interval of the trend log (e.g., 15 Min, 1 Hour, 1 Day) */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of the readings over the interval */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the readings over the interval */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the readings over the interval */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kW, Lumens) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., Consumption, Production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_logs_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of the alarm (e.g., High Consumption, Low Consumption) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alarm (e.g., Active, Resolved, Ignored) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alarm (e.g., Critical, Warning, Info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., Completed, Scheduled, In Progress) */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., Calibration, Repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Facility Manager, Data Analyst, Executive) */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building the user is associated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View Data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Generated, Sent, Archived) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., System, User, Building) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meter_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meter_group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_group_members_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES meter_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "tariff_name" TEXT /* Name of the tariff */,
  "tariff_rate" REAL /* Rate of the tariff (e.g., $/kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_tariffs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_rate" REAL /* Rate of the contract (e.g., $/kWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_contracts_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)
